message:
test(bundler): add signed bundle verification tests

Add two tests for bundle signature handling:
- allow_unsigned_skips_verification_for_signed_bundles: verifies that
  allow_unsigned() option correctly skips signature verification
- signed_bundle_without_verifier_fails_by_default: verifies that signed
  bundles fail when no verifier is configured

Fixed field name from 'algorithm' to 'signer' to match BundleSignature struct.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
